report_word_export_error_generic: Couldn't start the Word export. Please try again.
report_gate_notfound_message: This report link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your inspector for an up-to-date link.
report_gate_message_payment: Your inspection report is ready, but the invoice has not been paid yet. Please complete payment to view the report -- your inspector's contact details are listed below.
report_gate_message_agreement: Your inspection report is ready, but the inspection agreement has not been signed yet. Please sign the agreement to view the report.
report_verify_agreement_text: This link is an agreement verification token.
report_verify_notfound_body: No report or agreement matches this verification token.
report_verify_legacy_body: Integrity not cryptographically verifiable — this report was published before signing was introduced.
report_verify_failed_body: This report's cryptographic signature could not be verified. The content may have been altered.
report_verify_offline_intro_after: below. All cryptographic verification runs in your browser using the Web Crypto API — this page does not transmit the zip back to our server.
report_verify_offline_dropzone: Drop evidence.zip here, or click to select
report_verify_offline_footer: To verify offline without trusting this server, View Source on this page, save it locally along with evidence.zip, and open the local HTML file in a fresh browser session. All cryptography uses the browser's built-in Web Crypto API; no external network requests happen during verification.
report_verify_offline_error_missing_file: Missing audit-trail.json or public-key.pem in zip.
portal_landing_signin_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure sign-in link.
portal_landing_sent_title: Check your email for a sign-in link.
portal_landing_sent_body: If an account matches that address, a link is on its way. It expires in 15 minutes.
portal_landing_sent_recovery: Didn't get an email within a few minutes? Check your spam folder and make sure you used the same email your inspector has on file. Still stuck? Contact your inspection company.
portal_auth_expired_body: Sign-in links expire after 15 minutes. Request a new one to continue.
portal_inspection_doc_delete_error: Could not delete the document. Please try again.
portal_list_empty_description: Inspections shared with you will appear here.
portal_agreement_error_decline_failed: Failed to decline. Please try again.
portal_agreement_error_draw_signature: Please draw your signature before submitting.
portal_agreement_declined_body: The inspector has been notified that you declined this agreement.
portal_agreement_waiting_others: Thank you. We're waiting on the other signer{plural} ({signed} of {total} signed).
portal_agreement_thanks_signed: Thank you for signing this agreement.
portal_agreement_print_hint: In the print dialog, choose "Save as PDF" as destination.
portal_progress_notfound_body: This observation link is invalid or expired.
portal_repair_gate_no_access_body: You need a valid token or login to view this page.
portal_repair_gate_not_published_body: The report must be published before you can build a repair request.
portal_repair_gate_forbidden_body: The repair request builder is not enabled for this inspection company.
portal_repair_gate_error_body: Unable to load the repair builder. Please try again.
portal_repair_subtitle: Check the defects you want to request repair or credit for. Add amounts and notes for each.
portal_repair_empty: No repair-rated defects found in this report.
portal_invoice_finalizing: We’re finalizing your receipt; your paid invoice will appear here shortly.
portal_invoice_keep_receipt: Keep this receipt for your records.
portal_pay_secured_no_signature: Secured by Stripe · No signature required
portal_pay_already_paid: This invoice has already been paid. Refresh the page to see your receipt.
portal_pay_unavailable_before: Secure online card payment isn’t available right now. Please contact
portal_pay_error_generic: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
report_view_not_published_message: This report is not published. Please contact your inspector if you believe this is a mistake.
report_view_load_error: We couldn't load this report right now. Please try again in a moment.
agent_report_actions_workspace_hint: You already have an agent account for this email — sign in to track referrals and manage your profile.
agent_report_actions_workspace_error: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again in a moment.
agent_report_actions_signup_hint: Create a free agent account to track referrals across every inspection you send.
portal_payment_no_invoice_body: There is no invoice for this inspection yet.
repair_defect_note_placeholder: Optional — describe the repair or credit rationale
repair_intro_placeholder: Add a personal message to appear at the top of the shared repair request…
